name: JobTech / Platsbanken
description: Swedish public employment service job board. Searches the JobTech API (Arbetsförmedlingen) by keyword and returns matching job postings.

options.name: keywords
options.label: Search keywords
options.description: Array of job title keywords to search for. Each keyword triggers a separate API call.

options.name: locations
options.label: Location filters
options.description: Array of location names (used for reference; municipality filtering applied separately).

options.name: exclude_keywords
options.label: Exclude keywords
options.description: Job titles containing these terms (case-insensitive) are filtered out.

options.name: max_results
options.label: Max results per keyword
options.description: Maximum number of results to fetch per keyword from the API.

options.name: municipality_code
options.label: Municipality code
options.description: Swedish municipality code to filter by (e.g., 0180 for Stockholm). Leave empty for all Sweden.
